buggy:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
    }
    return map;
}
patch:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        
        // Check if column index 'col' is within the bounds of array 'values' before trying to access it
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        } else {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), null);  // Handle case where there are more headers but less data columns
        }
    }
    
    return map;
}
dev_fix:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}

buggy:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}
dev_fix:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    if (mapping == null) {
        return map;
    }
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}

buggy:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
    }
    return map;
}
patch:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    if(values.length > 0){
       for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
           final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
           if(col < values.length){ 
                map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
           } else {
               break;
           }
     } 
    }
    return map;
}
dev_fix:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}
issue_title: CSVRecord.toMap() fails if row length shorter than header length

buggy:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}
patch:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    try {
      for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
          final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
          if (col < values.length) {
              map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
          }
      }  
    } catch (NullPointerException e) {}
    return map;
}
dev_fix:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    if (mapping == null) {
        return map;
    }
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}

CSVParser: getHeaderMap throws NPE

buggy:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
    }
    return map;
}
patch:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if(values.length > col){
             map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }else{
             map.put(entry.getKey(), "");
        }
    }
    return map;
}
dev_fix:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}
